headerDisplay: Controls Toshiba air conditioners with WiFi modules through the Toshiba Home AC Control cloud. Use the same credentials as the Toshiba Home AC Control mobile app.
footerDisplay: All AC units registered to the account are exposed automatically as HeaterCooler accessories.

username.title: Username
username.description: Your Toshiba Home AC Control account username (usually an e-mail address).

password.title: Password
password.description: Your Toshiba Home AC Control account password.

refreshIntervalMinutes.title: State refresh interval (minutes)
refreshIntervalMinutes.description: How often the AC state is re-fetched over HTTP as a fallback. Real-time updates are pushed over MQTT independently of this.

swingModeType.title: Swing mode mapped to HomeKit "Oscillate"
swingModeType.description: Which physical swing mode is activated when HomeKit enables oscillation. Falls back to vertical if the unit does not support the selected mode.

exposeOutdoorTemperature.title: Expose outdoor temperature sensor
exposeOutdoorTemperature.description: Adds a temperature sensor service per AC unit reporting the outdoor unit's temperature.
